name: precision_5
purpose: Regression set for the candidate-precision fix. Five known-failure rows from the diagnostic_50 run where session recall is 100% but the answer is wrong because (a) scaffold text leaked into candidates / final answer, (b) the wrong candidate was ranked first, or (c) the repair fallback returned empty when verified candidates existed.

expected_answers.5d3d2817: Marketing specialist at a small startup

failure_modes.e47becba: scaffold_leak: final answer was the literal string 'Sub-answer'
failure_modes.58ef2f1c: empty_answer: repair returned empty when verified date candidates existed
failure_modes.5d3d2817: empty_answer: same as above for occupation
failure_modes.66f24dbb: wrong_candidate: 'Flowers' ranked above 'yellow dress' (wrong gift context)
failure_modes.af8d2e46: acceptable: '7 shirts' is correct (substring matches gold '7')
